title: potentilla minuta
intro: Potentilla minuta, also known as dwarf cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla minuta include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Potentilla minuta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
